description: A Cubist collage and mixed-media still life depicting a bottle of Bass beer amid fragmented geometric forms. The composition is set within a loosely sketched oval. Overlapping planes of brown paper, printed text from newspaper, and patterned paper create the characteristic Cubist deconstruction of objects. The bottle shape is discernible amid angular intersecting planes. The palette is restricted to browns, ochres, and grey-blue background. Pencil hatching and drawn lines define edges around the pasted elements.

_meta.title: Still life with Bottle of Bass
